mapper.select: select menu_id from scm_tenant_menu where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.insert: insert into scm_tenant_menu (id, tenant_id, menu_id, create_by, create_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{menuId}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select tm.tenant_id as tenantId, tm.menu_id as menuId, m.menu_name as menuName, ifnull(p.pause_status, '0') as pauseStatus, p.pause_time as pauseTime, p.pause_id as pauseId from scm_tenant_menu tm inner join sys_menu m on m.menu_id = tm.menu_id and m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') left join scm_tenant_menu_pause p on p.tenant_id = tm.tenant_id and p.menu_id = tm.menu_id where tm.tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by m.parent_id, m.order_num
